name: White Gazpacho
recipeIngredient: 4 cubes Instant Chicken Bouillon OR 4 cubes Chicken Bouillion
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and seed the cucumbers. Cut into cubes so that you have about 3 cups of cubed cucumber.
2. In a small saucepan, dissolve the bouillon in boiling water. Allow to cool completely.
3. In a blender or food processor, blend the cubed cucumber with half of the cooled bouillion liquid until smooth.
4. In a medium bowl, combine the blended cucumber mixture with the remaining cooled bouillion liquid, sour cream, lemon juice, garlic powder, and pepper. Mix well.
5. Chill thoroughly before serving.
6. Garnish as desired and serve with condiments. Refrigerate leftovers.
